F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
m: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀) F₁
  F₁'
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
F₁ X Y f ==> F₁' X Y f
 
C, D: bicat
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
m: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀) F₁
  F₁'
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
F₁ X Y f · id₁ (F₀ Y) ==> id₁ (F₀ X) · F₁' X Y f

      exact ((pr1 m X Y f)^-1).
    
C, D: bicat
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
m: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀) F₁
  F₁'
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(λ η : F₁ X Y f ==> F₁' X Y f, is_invertible_2cell η)
  ((rinvunitor (F₁ X Y f) • (pr1 m X Y f) ^-1)
   • lunitor (F₁' X Y f))
 cbn ; is_iso.
  Defined.

 invertible_2cell (F₁ X Y f) (F₁' X Y f))
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀) F₁ F₁'

• rinvunitor (F₁ X Y f) = pr1 (pr1 m X Y f)

C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
F₀, G₀: ps_base C D
η₀: adjoint_equivalence F₀ G₀
F₁: map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
G₁: map1cells_disp_bicat G₀
η₁: F₁ -->[ η₀] G₁
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence η₀ η₁

  
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
F₀, G₀: ps_base C D
η₀: adjoint_equivalence F₀ G₀
F₁: map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
G₁: map1cells_disp_bicat G₀
η₁: F₁ -->[ η₀] G₁
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence η₀ η₁

    
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
∏ (F₀ G₀ : ps_base C D)
(η₀ : adjoint_equivalence F₀ G₀)
(F₁ : map1cells_disp_bicat F₀)
(G₁ : map1cells_disp_bicat G₀) (η₁ : F₁ -->[ η₀] G₁),
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence η₀ η₁

    
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
is_univalent_2_0 (ps_base C D)
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
∏ a : ps_base C D,
(λ (a0 b : ps_base C D)
 (f : adjoint_equivalence a0 b),
 ∏ (F₁ : map1cells_disp_bicat a0)
 (G₁ : map1cells_disp_bicat b) (η₁ : F₁ -->[ f] G₁),
 disp_left_adjoint_equivalence f η₁) a a
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a)

HD: is_univalent_2 D
is_univalent_2_0 (ps_base C D)
 
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
is_univalent_2 D

      exact HD.
    
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
∏ a : ps_base C D,
(λ (a0 b : ps_base C D)
 (f : adjoint_equivalence a0 b),
 ∏ (F₁ : map1cells_disp_bicat a0)
 (G₁ : map1cells_disp_bicat b) (η₁ : F₁ -->[ f] G₁),
 disp_left_adjoint_equivalence f η₁) a a
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a)
 
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
η₁: F₁ -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀] F₁'
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀) η₁

      
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
η₁: ∏ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell (id₁ (F₀ X) · F₁' X Y f)
  (F₁ X Y f · id₁ (F₀ Y))
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀) η₁

      
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
η₁: ∏ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell (id₁ (F₀ X) · F₁' X Y f)
  (F₁ X Y f · id₁ (F₀ Y))
H:= pr2
  (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence
     F₀ F₁ F₁'
     (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
           (lunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁' x y f))))): (λ ff : F₁ -->[
        internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀] F₁',
 disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀) ff)
  (pr1
     (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence
        F₀ F₁ F₁'
        (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
              (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (F₁' x y f))))))
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀) η₁

      
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
η₁: ∏ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell (id₁ (F₀ X) · F₁' X Y f)
  (F₁ X Y f · id₁ (F₀ Y))
H:= pr2
  (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence
     F₀ F₁ F₁'
     (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
           (lunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁' x y f))))): (λ ff : F₁ -->[
        internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀] F₁',
 disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀) ff)
  (pr1
     (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence
        F₀ F₁ F₁'
        (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
              (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (F₁' x y f))))))
pr1
  (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence F₀
     F₁ F₁'
     (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
           (lunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁' x y f))))) =
η₁

      
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
η₁: ∏ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell (id₁ (F₀ X) · F₁' X Y f)
  (F₁ X Y f · id₁ (F₀ Y))

     F₀ F₁ F₁'
     (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
           (lunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁' x y f))))): (λ ff : F₁ -->[
        internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀] F₁',
 disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀) ff)
  (pr1
     (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence
        F₀ F₁ F₁'
        (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
              (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (F₁' x y f))))))
x: C
pr1
  (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence F₀
     F₁ F₁'
     (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
           (lunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁' x y f))))) x =
η₁ x

      
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
η₁: ∏ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell (id₁ (F₀ X) · F₁' X Y f)
  (F₁ X Y f · id₁ (F₀ Y))

     F₀ F₁ F₁'
     (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
           (lunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁' x y f))))): (λ ff : F₁ -->[
        internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀] F₁',
 disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀) ff)
  (pr1
     (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence
        F₀ F₁ F₁'
        (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
              (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (F₁' x y f))))))
x, y: C
pr1
  (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence F₀
     F₁ F₁'
     (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
           (lunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁' x y f))))) x
  y = η₁ x y

      
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
η₁: ∏ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell (id₁ (F₀ X) · F₁' X Y f)

     F₀ F₁ F₁'
     (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
           (lunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁' x y f))))): (λ ff : F₁ -->[
        internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀] F₁',

   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀) ff)
  (pr1
     (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence
        F₀ F₁ F₁'
        (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
              (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (F₁' x y f))))))
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence F₀
     F₁ F₁'
     (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
           (lunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁' x y f))))) x
  y f = η₁ x y f

      
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
η₁: ∏ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell (id₁ (F₀ X) · F₁' X Y f)
  (F₁ X Y f · id₁ (F₀ Y))
H:= pr2
  (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence
     F₀ F₁ F₁'
     (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
           (lunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁' x y f))))): (λ ff : F₁ -->[
        internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀] F₁',
 disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀) ff)
  (pr1
     (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence
        F₀ F₁ F₁'
        (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
              (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (F₁' x y f))))))
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (pr1
     (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence
        F₀ F₁ F₁'
        (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
              (lunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁' x y f)))))
     x y f) = pr1 (η₁ x y f)

      
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
η₁: ∏ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell (id₁ (F₀ X) · F₁' X Y f)
  (F₁ X Y f · id₁ (F₀ Y))
H:= pr2
  (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence
     F₀ F₁ F₁'
     (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
           (lunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁' x y f))))): (λ ff : F₁ -->[
        internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀] F₁',
 disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀) ff)
  (pr1
     (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence
        F₀ F₁ F₁'
        (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
              (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (F₁' x y f))))))
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(lunitor (F₁' x y f)
 • ((linvunitor (F₁' x y f) • η₁ x y f)
    • runitor (F₁ x y f))) • rinvunitor (F₁ x y f) =
pr1 (η₁ x y f)

      
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
η₁: ∏ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell (id₁ (F₀ X) · F₁' X Y f)
  (F₁ X Y f · id₁ (F₀ Y))
H:= pr2
  (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence
     F₀ F₁ F₁'
     (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
           (lunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁' x y f))))): (λ ff : F₁ -->[
        internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀] F₁',
 disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀) ff)
  (pr1
     (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence
        F₀ F₁ F₁'
        (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
              (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (F₁' x y f))))))
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(((lunitor (F₁' x y f) • linvunitor (F₁' x y f))
  • η₁ x y f) • runitor (F₁ x y f))
• rinvunitor (F₁ x y f) = pr1 (η₁ x y f)

      
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
η₁: ∏ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell (id₁ (F₀ X) · F₁' X Y f)
  (F₁ X Y f · id₁ (F₀ Y))
H:= pr2
  (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence
     F₀ F₁ F₁'
     (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
           (lunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁' x y f))))): (λ ff : F₁ -->[
        internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀] F₁',
 disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀) ff)
  (pr1
     (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence
        F₀ F₁ F₁'
        (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
              (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (F₁' x y f))))))
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
((id₂ (id₁ (F₀ x) · F₁' x y f) • η₁ x y f)
 • runitor (F₁ x y f)) • rinvunitor (F₁ x y f) =
pr1 (η₁ x y f)

      
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
η₁: ∏ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell (id₁ (F₀ X) · F₁' X Y f)

     F₀ F₁ F₁'
     (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
           (lunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁' x y f))))): (λ ff : F₁ -->[
        internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀] F₁',

   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀) ff)
  (pr1
     (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence
        F₀ F₁ F₁'
        (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
              (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (F₁' x y f))))))
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(η₁ x y f • runitor (F₁ x y f))
• rinvunitor (F₁ x y f) = pr1 (η₁ x y f)

      
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
η₁: ∏ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell (id₁ (F₀ X) · F₁' X Y f)
  (F₁ X Y f · id₁ (F₀ Y))
H:= pr2
  (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence
     F₀ F₁ F₁'
     (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
           (lunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁' x y f))))): (λ ff : F₁ -->[
        internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀] F₁',
 disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀) ff)
  (pr1
     (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence
        F₀ F₁ F₁'
        (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
              (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (F₁' x y f))))))
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
η₁ x y f
• (runitor (F₁ x y f) • rinvunitor (F₁ x y f)) =
pr1 (η₁ x y f)

      
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
η₁: ∏ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell (id₁ (F₀ X) · F₁' X Y f)
  (F₁ X Y f · id₁ (F₀ Y))
H:= pr2
  (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence
     F₀ F₁ F₁'
     (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
           (lunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁' x y f))))): (λ ff : F₁ -->[
        internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀] F₁',
 disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀) ff)
  (pr1
     (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence
        F₀ F₁ F₁'
        (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
              (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (F₁' x y f))))))
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
η₁ x y f • id₂ (F₁ x y f · id₁ (F₀ y)) =
pr1 (η₁ x y f)

      
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
η₁: ∏ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell (id₁ (F₀ X) · F₁' X Y f)
  (F₁ X Y f · id₁ (F₀ Y))
H:= pr2
  (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence
     F₀ F₁ F₁'
     (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
           (lunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁' x y f))))): (λ ff : F₁ -->[
        internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀] F₁',
 disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity F₀) ff)
  (pr1
     (all_invertible_2cell_to_disp_adjoint_equivalence
        F₀ F₁ F₁'
        (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (F₁ x y f))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (inv_of_invertible_2cell (η₁ x y f))
              (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (F₁' x y f))))))
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
η₁ x y f = pr1 (η₁ x y f)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Definition map1cells_disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
             (HD : is_univalent_2 D)
             {F₀ G₀ : ps_base C D}
             {η₀ : F₀ --> G₀}
             (Hη₀ : left_adjoint_equivalence η₀)
             (F₁ : map1cells_disp_bicat F₀)
             (G₁ : map1cells_disp_bicat G₀)
             (η₁ : F₁ -->[ η₀ ] G₁)
    : disp_left_adjoint_equivalence Hη₀ η₁
    := map1cells_disp_left_adjoint_equivalence_help HD (η₀ ,, Hη₀) F₁ G₁ η₁.

  
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
disp_univalent_2_0 map1cells_disp_bicat

  
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
disp_univalent_2_0 map1cells_disp_bicat

    
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
fiberwise_univalent_2_0 map1cells_disp_bicat

    
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
isweq
  (disp_idtoiso_2_0 map1cells_disp_bicat (idpath F₀)
     F₁ F₁')

    
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
transportf (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
  (idpath F₀) F₁ = F₁'
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (idtoiso_2_0 F₀ F₀ (idpath F₀)) F₁ F₁'
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
?w ~
disp_idtoiso_2_0 map1cells_disp_bicat 
  (idpath F₀) F₁ F₁'

    
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
transportf (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
  (idpath F₀) F₁ = F₁'
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (idtoiso_2_0 F₀ F₀ (idpath F₀)) F₁ F₁'
 
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
transportf (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
  (idpath F₀) F₁ ~ F₁'
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (idtoiso_2_0 F₀ F₀ (idpath F₀)) F₁ F₁'

      
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
C → UU
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
∏ x : C,
(λ x0 : C,
 transportf
   (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
   (idpath F₀) F₁ x0 = F₁' x0) x ≃ 
?Q x
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
(∏ x : C, ?Q x)
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (idtoiso_2_0 F₀ F₀ (idpath F₀)) F₁ F₁'

      
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
C → UU
 exact (λ X, ∏ (Y : C) (f : X --> Y), F₁ X Y f = F₁' X Y f).
      
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
∏ x : C,
(λ x0 : C,
 transportf
   (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
   (idpath F₀) F₁ x0 = F₁' x0) x
≃ (λ X : C,
   ∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧), F₁ X Y f = F₁' X Y f) x
 
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D

X: C
F₁ X = F₁' X
≃ (∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧), F₁ X Y f = F₁' X Y f)

≃ (∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧), F₁ X Y f = F₁' X Y f)

X: C

(λ x0 : C, F₁ X x0 = F₁' X x0) x
≃ (λ x0 : C, ∏ f : C ⟦ X, x0 ⟧, F₁ X x0 f = F₁' X x0 f)
    x

≃ (∏ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, F₁ X Y f = F₁' X Y f)

X, Y: C
F₁ X Y ~ F₁' X Y
≃ (∏ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, F₁ X Y f = F₁' X Y f)

        apply idweq.
      
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D

(∏ x : C,
 (λ X : C,
  ∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧), F₁ X Y f = F₁' X Y f) x)
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (idtoiso_2_0 F₀ F₀ (idpath F₀)) F₁ F₁'

∏ x : C,
(∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, Y ⟧), F₁ x Y f = F₁' x Y f)
≃ ?Goal x

(∏ x : C, ?Goal x)
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (idtoiso_2_0 F₀ F₀ (idpath F₀)) F₁ F₁'

≃ ?Goal x

≃ ?Goal X

X: C

(∏ f : C ⟦ X, x ⟧, F₁ X x f = F₁' X x f) ≃ ?Goal0 x

(∏ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, F₁ X Y f = F₁' X Y f) ≃ ?Goal0 Y

          
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
X, Y: C
C ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → UU
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
X, Y: C
∏ x : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
(λ x0 : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, F₁ X Y x0 = F₁' X Y x0) x ≃ ?Q x

          
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
X, Y: C
C ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → UU
 exact (λ f, invertible_2cell (F₁ X Y f) (F₁' X Y f)).
          
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
X, Y: C
∏ x : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
(λ x0 : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, F₁ X Y x0 = F₁' X Y x0) x
≃ (λ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
   invertible_2cell (F₁ X Y f) (F₁' X Y f)) x
 
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
F₁ X Y f = F₁' X Y f
≃ invertible_2cell (F₁ X Y f) (F₁' X Y f)

             exact (make_weq (idtoiso_2_1 (F₁ X Y f) (F₁' X Y f)) (HD_2_1 _ _ _ _)).
        
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
(∏ x : C,
 (λ X : C,
  ∏ x0 : C,
  (λ Y : C,
   ∏ x1 : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
   (λ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
    invertible_2cell (F₁ X Y f) (F₁' X Y f)) x1) x0) x)
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (idtoiso_2_0 F₀ F₀ (idpath F₀)) F₁ F₁'
 exact (all_invertible_2cell_is_disp_adjoint_equivalence HD_2_1 F₀ F₁ F₁').
    
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
(all_invertible_2cell_is_disp_adjoint_equivalence
   HD_2_1 F₀ F₁ F₁'
 ∘ weqonsecfibers
     (λ X : C,
      ∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧), F₁ X Y f = F₁' X Y f)
     (λ X : C,
      ∏ x : C,
      (λ Y : C,
       ∏ x0 : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
       (λ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
        invertible_2cell (F₁ X Y f) (F₁' X Y f)) x0) x)
     (λ X : C,
      weqonsecfibers
        (λ x : C,
         ∏ f : C ⟦ X, x ⟧, F₁ X x f = F₁' X x f)
        (λ Y : C,
         ∏ x : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
         (λ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
          invertible_2cell (F₁ X Y f) (F₁' X Y f)) x)
        (λ Y : C,
         weqonsecfibers
           (λ x : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, F₁ X Y x = F₁' X Y x)
           (λ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
            invertible_2cell (F₁ X Y f) (F₁' X Y f))
           (λ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
            make_weq
              (idtoiso_2_1 (F₁ X Y f) (F₁' X Y f))
              (HD_2_1 (F₀ X) (F₀ Y) (F₁ X Y f)
                 (F₁' X Y f))
            :
            (λ x : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, F₁ X Y x = F₁' X Y x) f
            ≃ (λ f0 : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
               invertible_2cell (F₁ X Y f0)
                 (F₁' X Y f0)) f)
         :
         (∏ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, F₁ X Y f = F₁' X Y f)
         ≃ (λ Y0 : C,
            ∏ x : C ⟦ X, Y0 ⟧,
            (λ f : C ⟦ X, Y0 ⟧,
             invertible_2cell (F₁ X Y0 f) (F₁' X Y0 f))
              x) Y)
      :
      (∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
       F₁ X Y f = F₁' X Y f)
      ≃ (λ X0 : C,
         ∏ x : C,
         (λ Y : C,
          ∏ x0 : C ⟦ X0, Y ⟧,
          (λ f : C ⟦ X0, Y ⟧,
           invertible_2cell (F₁ X0 Y f) (F₁' X0 Y f))
            x0) x) X)
 ∘ weqonsecfibers
     (λ x : C,
      transportf
        (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
        (idpath F₀) F₁ x = F₁' x)
     (λ X : C,
      ∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧), F₁ X Y f = F₁' X Y f)
     (λ X : C,
      weqonsecfibers (λ x : C, F₁ X x = F₁' X x)
        (λ x : C,
         ∏ f : C ⟦ X, x ⟧, F₁ X x f = F₁' X x f)
        (λ Y : C,
         idweq
           (∏ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, F₁ X Y f = F₁' X Y f)
         ∘ make_weq
             (toforallpaths
                (λ _ : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ Y ⟧)
                (F₁ X Y) (F₁' X Y))
             (isweqtoforallpaths
                (λ _ : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ Y ⟧)
                (F₁ X Y) (F₁' X Y))
         :
         (λ x : C, F₁ X x = F₁' X x) Y
         ≃ (λ x : C,
            ∏ f : C ⟦ X, x ⟧, F₁ X x f = F₁' X x f) Y)
      ∘ make_weq
          (toforallpaths
             (λ t : C, C ⟦ X, t ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ t ⟧)
             (F₁ X) (F₁' X))
          (isweqtoforallpaths
             (λ t : C, C ⟦ X, t ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ t ⟧)
             (F₁ X) (F₁' X))
      :
      (λ x : C,
       transportf
         (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
         (idpath F₀) F₁ x = F₁' x) X
      ≃ (λ X0 : C,
         ∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X0, Y ⟧),
         F₁ X0 Y f = F₁' X0 Y f) X)
 ∘ make_weq
     (toforallpaths
        (λ t : C,
         ∏ Y : C, C ⟦ t, Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ t, F₀ Y ⟧)
        (transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁) F₁')
     (isweqtoforallpaths
        (λ t : C,
         ∏ Y : C, C ⟦ t, Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ t, F₀ Y ⟧)
        (transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁) F₁'))%weq ~
disp_idtoiso_2_0 map1cells_disp_bicat (idpath F₀) F₁
  F₁'
 
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁, F₁': map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
p: transportf
  (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
  (idpath F₀) F₁ = F₁'
(all_invertible_2cell_is_disp_adjoint_equivalence
   HD_2_1 F₀ F₁ F₁'
 ∘ weqonsecfibers
     (λ X : C,
      ∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧), F₁ X Y f = F₁' X Y f)
     (λ X : C,
      ∏ (x : C) (x0 : C ⟦ X, x ⟧),
      invertible_2cell (F₁ X x x0) (F₁' X x x0))
     (λ X : C,
      weqonsecfibers
        (λ x : C,
         ∏ f : C ⟦ X, x ⟧, F₁ X x f = F₁' X x f)
        (λ Y : C,
         ∏ x : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
         invertible_2cell (F₁ X Y x) (F₁' X Y x))
        (λ Y : C,
         weqonsecfibers
           (λ x : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, F₁ X Y x = F₁' X Y x)
           (λ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
            invertible_2cell (F₁ X Y f) (F₁' X Y f))
           (λ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
            make_weq
              (idtoiso_2_1 (F₁ X Y f) (F₁' X Y f))
              (HD_2_1 (F₀ X) (F₀ Y) (F₁ X Y f)
                 (F₁' X Y f)))))
 ∘ weqonsecfibers
     (λ x : C,
      transportf
        (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
        (idpath F₀) F₁ x = F₁' x)
     (λ X : C,
      ∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧), F₁ X Y f = F₁' X Y f)
     (λ X : C,
      weqonsecfibers (λ x : C, F₁ X x = F₁' X x)
        (λ x : C,
         ∏ f : C ⟦ X, x ⟧, F₁ X x f = F₁' X x f)
        (λ Y : C,
         idweq
           (∏ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, F₁ X Y f = F₁' X Y f)
         ∘ make_weq
             (toforallpaths
                (λ _ : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ Y ⟧)
                (F₁ X Y) (F₁' X Y))
             (isweqtoforallpaths
                (λ _ : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ Y ⟧)
                (F₁ X Y) (F₁' X Y)))
      ∘ make_weq
          (toforallpaths
             (λ t : C, C ⟦ X, t ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ t ⟧)
             (F₁ X) (F₁' X))
          (isweqtoforallpaths
             (λ t : C, C ⟦ X, t ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ t ⟧)
             (F₁ X) (F₁' X)))
 ∘ make_weq
     (toforallpaths
        (λ t : C,
         ∏ Y : C, C ⟦ t, Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ t, F₀ Y ⟧)
        (transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁) F₁')
     (isweqtoforallpaths
        (λ t : C,
         ∏ Y : C, C ⟦ t, Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ t, F₀ Y ⟧)
        (transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁) F₁'))%weq p =
disp_idtoiso_2_0 map1cells_disp_bicat (idpath F₀) F₁
  F₁' p

      
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁: map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
(all_invertible_2cell_is_disp_adjoint_equivalence
   HD_2_1 F₀ F₁
   (transportf
      (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
      (idpath F₀) F₁)
 ∘ weqonsecfibers
     (λ X : C,
      ∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
      F₁ X Y f =
      transportf
        (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
        (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f)
     (λ X : C,
      ∏ (x : C) (x0 : C ⟦ X, x ⟧),
      invertible_2cell (F₁ X x x0)
        (transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁ X x x0))
     (λ X : C,
      weqonsecfibers
        (λ x : C,
         ∏ f : C ⟦ X, x ⟧,
         F₁ X x f =
         transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁ X x f)
        (λ Y : C,
         ∏ x : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
         invertible_2cell (F₁ X Y x)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁
              X Y x))
        (λ Y : C,
         weqonsecfibers
           (λ x : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
            F₁ X Y x =
            transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁
              X Y x)
           (λ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
            invertible_2cell (F₁ X Y f)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀)
                 F₁ X Y f))
           (λ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
            make_weq
              (idtoiso_2_1 (F₁ X Y f)
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : ps_base C D,
                     map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f))
              (HD_2_1 (F₀ X) (F₀ Y) (F₁ X Y f)
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : ps_base C D,
                     map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f)))))
 ∘ weqonsecfibers
     (λ x : C,
      transportf
        (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
        (idpath F₀) F₁ x =
      transportf
        (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
        (idpath F₀) F₁ x)
     (λ X : C,
      ∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
      F₁ X Y f =
      transportf
        (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
        (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f)
     (λ X : C,
      weqonsecfibers
        (λ x : C,
         F₁ X x =
         transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁ X x)
        (λ x : C,
         ∏ f : C ⟦ X, x ⟧,
         F₁ X x f =
         transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁ X x f)
        (λ Y : C,
         idweq
           (∏ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
            F₁ X Y f =
            transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁
              X Y f)
         ∘ make_weq
             (toforallpaths
                (λ _ : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ Y ⟧)
                (F₁ X Y)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : ps_base C D,
                    map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                   (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y))
             (isweqtoforallpaths
                (λ _ : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ Y ⟧)
                (F₁ X Y)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : ps_base C D,
                    map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                   (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y)))
      ∘ make_weq
          (toforallpaths
             (λ t : C, C ⟦ X, t ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ t ⟧)
             (F₁ X)
             (transportf
                (λ z : ps_base C D,
                 map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀)
                F₁ X))
          (isweqtoforallpaths
             (λ t : C, C ⟦ X, t ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ t ⟧)
             (F₁ X)
             (transportf
                (λ z : ps_base C D,
                 map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀)
                F₁ X)))
 ∘ make_weq
     (toforallpaths
        (λ t : C,
         ∏ Y : C, C ⟦ t, Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ t, F₀ Y ⟧)
        (transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁)
        (transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁))
     (isweqtoforallpaths
        (λ t : C,
         ∏ Y : C, C ⟦ t, Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ t, F₀ Y ⟧)
        (transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁)
        (transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁)))%weq
  (idpath
     (transportf
        (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
        (idpath F₀) F₁)) =
disp_idtoiso_2_0 map1cells_disp_bicat (idpath F₀) F₁
  (transportf
     (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
     (idpath F₀) F₁)
  (idpath
     (transportf
        (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
        (idpath F₀) F₁))

      
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁: map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
isPredicate
  (disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
     (idtoiso_2_0 F₀ F₀ (idpath F₀)))
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁: map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
pr1
  ((all_invertible_2cell_is_disp_adjoint_equivalence
      HD_2_1 F₀ F₁
      (transportf
         (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
         (idpath F₀) F₁)
    ∘ weqonsecfibers
        (λ X : C,
         ∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
         F₁ X Y f =
         transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f)
        (λ X : C,
         ∏ (x : C) (x0 : C ⟦ X, x ⟧),
         invertible_2cell 
           (F₁ X x x0)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) 
              (idpath F₀) F₁ X x x0))
        (λ X : C,
         weqonsecfibers
           (λ x : C,
            ∏ f : C ⟦ X, x ⟧,
            F₁ X x f =
            transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) 
              (idpath F₀) F₁ X x f)
           (λ Y : C,
            ∏ x : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
            invertible_2cell 
              (F₁ X Y x)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) 
                 (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y x))
           (λ Y : C,
            weqonsecfibers
              (λ x : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
               F₁ X Y x =
               transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) 
                 (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y x)
              (λ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
               invertible_2cell 
                 (F₁ X Y f)
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : ps_base C D,
                     map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f))
              (λ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
               make_weq
                 (idtoiso_2_1 
                    (F₁ X Y f)
                    (transportf
                       (λ 
                       z : ps_base C D,
                       map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                       (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f))
                 (HD_2_1 
                    (F₀ X) 
                    (F₀ Y) 
                    (F₁ X Y f)
                    (transportf
                       (λ 
                       z : ps_base C D,
                       map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                       (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f)))))
    ∘ weqonsecfibers
        (λ x : C,
         transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁ x =
         transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁ x)
        (λ X : C,
         ∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
         F₁ X Y f =
         transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f)
        (λ X : C,
         weqonsecfibers
           (λ x : C,
            F₁ X x =
            transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) 
              (idpath F₀) F₁ X x)
           (λ x : C,
            ∏ f : C ⟦ X, x ⟧,
            F₁ X x f =
            transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) 
              (idpath F₀) F₁ X x f)
           (λ Y : C,
            idweq
              (∏ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
               F₁ X Y f =
               transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) 
                 (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f)
            ∘ make_weq
                (toforallpaths
                   (λ _ : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ Y ⟧)
                   (F₁ X Y)
                   (transportf
                      (λ 
                       z : ps_base C D,
                       map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                      (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y))
                (isweqtoforallpaths
                   (λ _ : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ Y ⟧)
                   (F₁ X Y)
                   (transportf
                      (λ 
                       z : ps_base C D,
                       map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                      (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y)))
         ∘ make_weq
             (toforallpaths
                (λ t : C,
                 C ⟦ X, t ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ t ⟧) 
                (F₁ X)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : ps_base C D,
                    map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                   (idpath F₀) F₁ X))
             (isweqtoforallpaths
                (λ t : C,
                 C ⟦ X, t ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ t ⟧) 
                (F₁ X)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : ps_base C D,
                    map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                   (idpath F₀) F₁ X)))
    ∘ make_weq
        (toforallpaths
           (λ t : C,
            ∏ Y : C, C ⟦ t, Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ t, F₀ Y ⟧)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) 
              (idpath F₀) F₁)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) 
              (idpath F₀) F₁))
        (isweqtoforallpaths
           (λ t : C,
            ∏ Y : C, C ⟦ t, Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ t, F₀ Y ⟧)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) 
              (idpath F₀) F₁)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) 
              (idpath F₀) F₁)))%weq
     (idpath
        (transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁))) =
pr1
  (disp_idtoiso_2_0 map1cells_disp_bicat 
     (idpath F₀) F₁
     (transportf
        (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
        (idpath F₀) F₁)
     (idpath
        (transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁)))

C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁: map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
pr1
  ((all_invertible_2cell_is_disp_adjoint_equivalence
      HD_2_1 F₀ F₁
      (transportf
         (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
         (idpath F₀) F₁)
    ∘ weqonsecfibers
        (λ X : C,
         ∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
         F₁ X Y f =
         transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f)
        (λ X : C,
         ∏ (x : C) (x0 : C ⟦ X, x ⟧),
         invertible_2cell (F₁ X x x0)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁
              X x x0))
        (λ X : C,
         weqonsecfibers
           (λ x : C,
            ∏ f : C ⟦ X, x ⟧,
            F₁ X x f =
            transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁
              X x f)
           (λ Y : C,
            ∏ x : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
            invertible_2cell (F₁ X Y x)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀)
                 F₁ X Y x))
           (λ Y : C,
            weqonsecfibers
              (λ x : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
               F₁ X Y x =
               transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀)
                 F₁ X Y x)
              (λ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
               invertible_2cell (F₁ X Y f)
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : ps_base C D,
                     map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f))
              (λ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
               make_weq
                 (idtoiso_2_1 (F₁ X Y f)
                    (transportf
                       (λ z : ps_base C D,
                        map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                       (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f))
                 (HD_2_1 (F₀ X) (F₀ Y) (F₁ X Y f)
                    (transportf
                       (λ z : ps_base C D,
                        map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                       (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f)))))
    ∘ weqonsecfibers
        (λ x : C,
         transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁ x =
         transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁ x)
        (λ X : C,
         ∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
         F₁ X Y f =
         transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f)
        (λ X : C,
         weqonsecfibers
           (λ x : C,
            F₁ X x =
            transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁
              X x)
           (λ x : C,
            ∏ f : C ⟦ X, x ⟧,
            F₁ X x f =
            transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁
              X x f)
           (λ Y : C,
            idweq
              (∏ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
               F₁ X Y f =
               transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀)
                 F₁ X Y f)
            ∘ make_weq
                (toforallpaths
                   (λ _ : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ Y ⟧)
                   (F₁ X Y)
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : ps_base C D,
                       map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                      (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y))
                (isweqtoforallpaths
                   (λ _ : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ Y ⟧)
                   (F₁ X Y)
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : ps_base C D,
                       map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                      (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y)))
         ∘ make_weq
             (toforallpaths
                (λ t : C,
                 C ⟦ X, t ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ t ⟧) (F₁ X)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : ps_base C D,
                    map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                   (idpath F₀) F₁ X))
             (isweqtoforallpaths
                (λ t : C,
                 C ⟦ X, t ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ t ⟧) (F₁ X)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : ps_base C D,
                    map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                   (idpath F₀) F₁ X)))
    ∘ make_weq
        (toforallpaths
           (λ t : C,
            ∏ Y : C, C ⟦ t, Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ t, F₀ Y ⟧)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁))
        (isweqtoforallpaths
           (λ t : C,
            ∏ Y : C, C ⟦ t, Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ t, F₀ Y ⟧)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁)))%weq
     (idpath
        (transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁))) =
pr1
  (disp_idtoiso_2_0 map1cells_disp_bicat (idpath F₀)
     F₁
     (transportf
        (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
        (idpath F₀) F₁)
     (idpath
        (transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁)))

      
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁: map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
X: C
pr1
  ((all_invertible_2cell_is_disp_adjoint_equivalence
      HD_2_1 F₀ F₁
      (transportf
         (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
         (idpath F₀) F₁)
    ∘ weqonsecfibers
        (λ X : C,
         ∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
         F₁ X Y f =
         transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f)
        (λ X : C,
         ∏ (x : C) (x0 : C ⟦ X, x ⟧),
         invertible_2cell (F₁ X x x0)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁
              X x x0))
        (λ X : C,
         weqonsecfibers
           (λ x : C,
            ∏ f : C ⟦ X, x ⟧,
            F₁ X x f =
            transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁
              X x f)
           (λ Y : C,
            ∏ x : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
            invertible_2cell (F₁ X Y x)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀)
                 F₁ X Y x))
           (λ Y : C,
            weqonsecfibers
              (λ x : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
               F₁ X Y x =
               transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀)
                 F₁ X Y x)
              (λ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
               invertible_2cell (F₁ X Y f)
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : ps_base C D,
                     map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f))
              (λ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
               make_weq
                 (idtoiso_2_1 (F₁ X Y f)
                    (transportf
                       (λ z : ps_base C D,
                        map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                       (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f))
                 (HD_2_1 (F₀ X) (F₀ Y) (F₁ X Y f)
                    (transportf
                       (λ z : ps_base C D,
                        map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                       (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f)))))
    ∘ weqonsecfibers
        (λ x : C,
         transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁ x =
         transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁ x)
        (λ X : C,
         ∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
         F₁ X Y f =
         transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f)
        (λ X : C,
         weqonsecfibers
           (λ x : C,
            F₁ X x =
            transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁
              X x)
           (λ x : C,
            ∏ f : C ⟦ X, x ⟧,
            F₁ X x f =
            transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁
              X x f)
           (λ Y : C,
            idweq
              (∏ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
               F₁ X Y f =
               transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀)
                 F₁ X Y f)
            ∘ make_weq
                (toforallpaths
                   (λ _ : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ Y ⟧)
                   (F₁ X Y)
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : ps_base C D,
                       map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                      (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y))
                (isweqtoforallpaths
                   (λ _ : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ Y ⟧)
                   (F₁ X Y)
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : ps_base C D,
                       map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                      (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y)))
         ∘ make_weq
             (toforallpaths
                (λ t : C,
                 C ⟦ X, t ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ t ⟧) (F₁ X)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : ps_base C D,
                    map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                   (idpath F₀) F₁ X))
             (isweqtoforallpaths
                (λ t : C,
                 C ⟦ X, t ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ t ⟧) (F₁ X)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : ps_base C D,
                    map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                   (idpath F₀) F₁ X)))
    ∘ make_weq
        (toforallpaths
           (λ t : C,
            ∏ Y : C, C ⟦ t, Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ t, F₀ Y ⟧)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁))
        (isweqtoforallpaths
           (λ t : C,
            ∏ Y : C, C ⟦ t, Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ t, F₀ Y ⟧)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁)))%weq
     (idpath
        (transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁))) X =
pr1
  (disp_idtoiso_2_0 map1cells_disp_bicat (idpath F₀)
     F₁
     (transportf
        (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
        (idpath F₀) F₁)
     (idpath
        (transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁))) X

      
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁: map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
X, Y: C
pr1
  ((all_invertible_2cell_is_disp_adjoint_equivalence
      HD_2_1 F₀ F₁
      (transportf
         (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
         (idpath F₀) F₁)
    ∘ weqonsecfibers
        (λ X : C,
         ∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
         F₁ X Y f =
         transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f)
        (λ X : C,
         ∏ (x : C) (x0 : C ⟦ X, x ⟧),
         invertible_2cell (F₁ X x x0)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁
              X x x0))
        (λ X : C,
         weqonsecfibers
           (λ x : C,
            ∏ f : C ⟦ X, x ⟧,
            F₁ X x f =
            transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁
              X x f)
           (λ Y : C,
            ∏ x : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
            invertible_2cell (F₁ X Y x)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀)
                 F₁ X Y x))
           (λ Y : C,
            weqonsecfibers
              (λ x : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
               F₁ X Y x =
               transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀)
                 F₁ X Y x)
              (λ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
               invertible_2cell (F₁ X Y f)
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : ps_base C D,
                     map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f))
              (λ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
               make_weq
                 (idtoiso_2_1 (F₁ X Y f)
                    (transportf
                       (λ z : ps_base C D,
                        map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                       (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f))
                 (HD_2_1 (F₀ X) (F₀ Y) (F₁ X Y f)
                    (transportf
                       (λ z : ps_base C D,
                        map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                       (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f)))))
    ∘ weqonsecfibers
        (λ x : C,
         transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁ x =
         transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁ x)
        (λ X : C,
         ∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
         F₁ X Y f =
         transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f)
        (λ X : C,
         weqonsecfibers
           (λ x : C,
            F₁ X x =
            transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁
              X x)
           (λ x : C,
            ∏ f : C ⟦ X, x ⟧,
            F₁ X x f =
            transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁
              X x f)
           (λ Y : C,
            idweq
              (∏ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
               F₁ X Y f =
               transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀)
                 F₁ X Y f)
            ∘ make_weq
                (toforallpaths
                   (λ _ : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ Y ⟧)
                   (F₁ X Y)
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : ps_base C D,
                       map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                      (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y))
                (isweqtoforallpaths
                   (λ _ : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ Y ⟧)
                   (F₁ X Y)
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : ps_base C D,
                       map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                      (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y)))
         ∘ make_weq
             (toforallpaths
                (λ t : C,
                 C ⟦ X, t ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ t ⟧) (F₁ X)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : ps_base C D,
                    map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                   (idpath F₀) F₁ X))
             (isweqtoforallpaths
                (λ t : C,
                 C ⟦ X, t ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ t ⟧) (F₁ X)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : ps_base C D,
                    map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                   (idpath F₀) F₁ X)))
    ∘ make_weq
        (toforallpaths
           (λ t : C,
            ∏ Y : C, C ⟦ t, Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ t, F₀ Y ⟧)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁))
        (isweqtoforallpaths
           (λ t : C,
            ∏ Y : C, C ⟦ t, Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ t, F₀ Y ⟧)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁)))%weq
     (idpath
        (transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁))) X Y =
pr1
  (disp_idtoiso_2_0 map1cells_disp_bicat (idpath F₀)
     F₁
     (transportf
        (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
        (idpath F₀) F₁)
     (idpath
        (transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁))) X Y

      
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁: map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
pr1
  ((all_invertible_2cell_is_disp_adjoint_equivalence
      HD_2_1 F₀ F₁
      (transportf
         (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
         (idpath F₀) F₁)
    ∘ weqonsecfibers
        (λ X : C,
         ∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
         F₁ X Y f =
         transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f)
        (λ X : C,
         ∏ (x : C) (x0 : C ⟦ X, x ⟧),
         invertible_2cell (F₁ X x x0)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁
              X x x0))
        (λ X : C,
         weqonsecfibers
           (λ x : C,
            ∏ f : C ⟦ X, x ⟧,
            F₁ X x f =
            transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁
              X x f)
           (λ Y : C,
            ∏ x : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
            invertible_2cell (F₁ X Y x)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀)
                 F₁ X Y x))
           (λ Y : C,
            weqonsecfibers
              (λ x : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
               F₁ X Y x =
               transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀)
                 F₁ X Y x)
              (λ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
               invertible_2cell (F₁ X Y f)
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : ps_base C D,
                     map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f))
              (λ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
               make_weq
                 (idtoiso_2_1 (F₁ X Y f)
                    (transportf
                       (λ z : ps_base C D,
                        map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                       (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f))
                 (HD_2_1 (F₀ X) (F₀ Y) (F₁ X Y f)
                    (transportf
                       (λ z : ps_base C D,
                        map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                       (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f)))))
    ∘ weqonsecfibers
        (λ x : C,
         transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁ x =
         transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁ x)
        (λ X : C,
         ∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
         F₁ X Y f =
         transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f)
        (λ X : C,
         weqonsecfibers
           (λ x : C,
            F₁ X x =
            transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁
              X x)
           (λ x : C,
            ∏ f : C ⟦ X, x ⟧,
            F₁ X x f =
            transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁
              X x f)
           (λ Y : C,
            idweq
              (∏ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
               F₁ X Y f =
               transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀)
                 F₁ X Y f)
            ∘ make_weq
                (toforallpaths
                   (λ _ : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ Y ⟧)
                   (F₁ X Y)
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : ps_base C D,
                       map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                      (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y))
                (isweqtoforallpaths
                   (λ _ : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧, D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ Y ⟧)
                   (F₁ X Y)
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : ps_base C D,
                       map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                      (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y)))
         ∘ make_weq
             (toforallpaths
                (λ t : C,
                 C ⟦ X, t ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ t ⟧) (F₁ X)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : ps_base C D,
                    map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                   (idpath F₀) F₁ X))
             (isweqtoforallpaths
                (λ t : C,
                 C ⟦ X, t ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ t ⟧) (F₁ X)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : ps_base C D,
                    map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                   (idpath F₀) F₁ X)))
    ∘ make_weq
        (toforallpaths
           (λ t : C,
            ∏ Y : C, C ⟦ t, Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ t, F₀ Y ⟧)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁))
        (isweqtoforallpaths
           (λ t : C,
            ∏ Y : C, C ⟦ t, Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ t, F₀ Y ⟧)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁)
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁)))%weq
     (idpath
        (transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁))) X Y f =
pr1
  (disp_idtoiso_2_0 map1cells_disp_bicat (idpath F₀)
     F₁
     (transportf
        (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
        (idpath F₀) F₁)
     (idpath
        (transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁))) X Y f

      
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁: map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁: map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
pr1
  (pr1
     ((all_invertible_2cell_is_disp_adjoint_equivalence
         HD_2_1 F₀ F₁
         (transportf
            (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
            (idpath F₀) F₁)
       ∘ weqonsecfibers
           (λ X : C,
            ∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
            F₁ X Y f =
            transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) 
              (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f)
           (λ X : C,
            ∏ (x : C) (x0 : C ⟦ X, x ⟧),
            invertible_2cell 
              (F₁ X x x0)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) 
                 (idpath F₀) F₁ X x x0))
           (λ X : C,
            weqonsecfibers
              (λ x : C,
               ∏ f : C ⟦ X, x ⟧,
               F₁ X x f =
               transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) 
                 (idpath F₀) F₁ X x f)
              (λ Y : C,
               ∏ x : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
               invertible_2cell 
                 (F₁ X Y x)
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : ps_base C D,
                     map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y x))
              (λ Y : C,
               weqonsecfibers
                 (λ x : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
                  F₁ X Y x =
                  transportf
                    (λ z : ps_base C D,
                     map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y x)
                 (λ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
                  invertible_2cell 
                    (F₁ X Y f)
                    (transportf
                       (λ 
                       z : ps_base C D,
                       map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                       (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f))
                 (λ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
                  make_weq
                    (idtoiso_2_1 
                       (F₁ X Y f)
                       (transportf
                       (λ 
                       z : ..., 
                       map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                       (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f))
                    (HD_2_1 
                       (F₀ X) 
                       (F₀ Y) 
                       (F₁ X Y f)
                       (transportf
                       (λ 
                       z : ..., 
                       map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                       (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f)))))
       ∘ weqonsecfibers
           (λ x : C,
            transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) 
              (idpath F₀) F₁ x =
            transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) 
              (idpath F₀) F₁ x)
           (λ X : C,
            ∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
            F₁ X Y f =
            transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) 
              (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f)
           (λ X : C,
            weqonsecfibers
              (λ x : C,
               F₁ X x =
               transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) 
                 (idpath F₀) F₁ X x)
              (λ x : C,
               ∏ f : C ⟦ X, x ⟧,
               F₁ X x f =
               transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) 
                 (idpath F₀) F₁ X x f)
              (λ Y : C,
               idweq
                 (∏ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
                  F₁ X Y f =
                  transportf
                    (λ z : ps_base C D,
                     map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f)
               ∘ make_weq
                   (toforallpaths
                      (λ 
                       _ : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
                       D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ Y ⟧) 
                      (F₁ X Y)
                      (transportf
                       (λ 
                       z : ps_base C D,
                       map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                       (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y))
                   (isweqtoforallpaths
                      (λ 
                       _ : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
                       D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ Y ⟧) 
                      (F₁ X Y)
                      (transportf
                       (λ 
                       z : ps_base C D,
                       map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                       (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y)))
            ∘ make_weq
                (toforallpaths
                   (λ t : C,
                    C ⟦ X, t ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ t ⟧)
                   (F₁ X)
                   (transportf
                      (λ 
                       z : ps_base C D,
                       map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                      (idpath F₀) F₁ X))
                (isweqtoforallpaths
                   (λ t : C,
                    C ⟦ X, t ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ t ⟧)
                   (F₁ X)
                   (transportf
                      (λ 
                       z : ps_base C D,
                       map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                      (idpath F₀) F₁ X)))
       ∘ make_weq
           (toforallpaths
              (λ t : C,
               ∏ Y : C, C ⟦ t, Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ t, F₀ Y ⟧)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) 
                 (idpath F₀) F₁)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) 
                 (idpath F₀) F₁))
           (isweqtoforallpaths
              (λ t : C,
               ∏ Y : C, C ⟦ t, Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ t, F₀ Y ⟧)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) 
                 (idpath F₀) F₁)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) 
                 (idpath F₀) F₁)))%weq
        (idpath
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) 
              (idpath F₀) F₁))) X Y f) =
pr1
  (pr1
     (disp_idtoiso_2_0 map1cells_disp_bicat
        (idpath F₀) F₁
        (transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁)
        (idpath
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) 
              (idpath F₀) F₁))) X Y f)

      
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁: map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
 intro ; apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell. 
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁: map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
pr1
  (pr1
     ((all_invertible_2cell_is_disp_adjoint_equivalence
         HD_2_1 F₀ F₁
         (transportf
            (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
            (idpath F₀) F₁)
       ∘ weqonsecfibers
           (λ X : C,
            ∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
            F₁ X Y f =
            transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁
              X Y f)
           (λ X : C,
            ∏ (x : C) (x0 : C ⟦ X, x ⟧),
            invertible_2cell (F₁ X x x0)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀)
                 F₁ X x x0))
           (λ X : C,
            weqonsecfibers
              (λ x : C,
               ∏ f : C ⟦ X, x ⟧,
               F₁ X x f =
               transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀)
                 F₁ X x f)
              (λ Y : C,
               ∏ x : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
               invertible_2cell (F₁ X Y x)
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : ps_base C D,
                     map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y x))
              (λ Y : C,
               weqonsecfibers
                 (λ x : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
                  F₁ X Y x =
                  transportf
                    (λ z : ps_base C D,
                     map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y x)
                 (λ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
                  invertible_2cell (F₁ X Y f)
                    (transportf
                       (λ z : ps_base C D,
                        map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                       (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f))
                 (λ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
                  make_weq
                    (idtoiso_2_1 (F₁ X Y f)
                       (transportf
                          (λ z : ...,
                           map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                          (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f))
                    (HD_2_1 (F₀ X) (F₀ Y) (F₁ X Y f)
                       (transportf
                          (λ z : ...,
                           map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                          (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f)))))
       ∘ weqonsecfibers
           (λ x : C,
            transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁
              x =
            transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁
              x)
           (λ X : C,
            ∏ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
            F₁ X Y f =
            transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁
              X Y f)
           (λ X : C,
            weqonsecfibers
              (λ x : C,
               F₁ X x =
               transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀)
                 F₁ X x)
              (λ x : C,
               ∏ f : C ⟦ X, x ⟧,
               F₁ X x f =
               transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀)
                 F₁ X x f)
              (λ Y : C,
               idweq
                 (∏ f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
                  F₁ X Y f =
                  transportf
                    (λ z : ps_base C D,
                     map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y f)
               ∘ make_weq
                   (toforallpaths
                      (λ _ : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
                       D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ Y ⟧) (F₁ X Y)
                      (transportf
                         (λ z : ps_base C D,
                          map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                         (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y))
                   (isweqtoforallpaths
                      (λ _ : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧,
                       D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ Y ⟧) (F₁ X Y)
                      (transportf
                         (λ z : ps_base C D,
                          map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                         (idpath F₀) F₁ X Y)))
            ∘ make_weq
                (toforallpaths
                   (λ t : C,
                    C ⟦ X, t ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ t ⟧)
                   (F₁ X)
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : ps_base C D,
                       map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                      (idpath F₀) F₁ X))
                (isweqtoforallpaths
                   (λ t : C,
                    C ⟦ X, t ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ X, F₀ t ⟧)
                   (F₁ X)
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : ps_base C D,
                       map1cells_disp_bicat z)
                      (idpath F₀) F₁ X)))
       ∘ make_weq
           (toforallpaths
              (λ t : C,
               ∏ Y : C, C ⟦ t, Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ t, F₀ Y ⟧)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀)
                 F₁)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀)
                 F₁))
           (isweqtoforallpaths
              (λ t : C,
               ∏ Y : C, C ⟦ t, Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F₀ t, F₀ Y ⟧)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀)
                 F₁)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : ps_base C D,
                  map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀)
                 F₁)))%weq
        (idpath
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁)))
     X Y f) =
pr1
  (pr1
     (disp_idtoiso_2_0 map1cells_disp_bicat
        (idpath F₀) F₁
        (transportf
           (λ z : ps_base C D, map1cells_disp_bicat z)
           (idpath F₀) F₁)
        (idpath
           (transportf
              (λ z : ps_base C D,
               map1cells_disp_bicat z) (idpath F₀) F₁)))
     X Y f)

      
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁: map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(lunitor (F₁ X Y f) • id₂ (F₁ X Y f))
• rinvunitor (F₁ X Y f) =
lunitor (F₁ X Y f) • rinvunitor (F₁ X Y f)

      
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
F₀: ps_base C D
F₁: map1cells_disp_bicat F₀
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
lunitor (F₁ X Y f) • rinvunitor (F₁ X Y f) =
lunitor (F₁ X Y f) • rinvunitor (F₁ X Y f)

      reflexivity.
  Defined.

  Definition map1cells := total_bicat map1cells_disp_bicat.

  
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
is_univalent_2_1 map1cells

  
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
is_univalent_2_1 map1cells

    
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
is_univalent_2_1 (ps_base C D)
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
disp_univalent_2_1 map1cells_disp_bicat

    
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
is_univalent_2_1 (ps_base C D)
 
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
is_univalent_2_1 D

      exact HD_2_1.
    
C, D: bicat
HD_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 D
disp_univalent_2_1 map1cells_disp_bicat
 exact map1cells_disp_univalent_2_1.
  Defined.

  
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
is_univalent_2_0 map1cells

  
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
is_univalent_2_0 map1cells

    
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
is_univalent_2_0 (ps_base C D)
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
disp_univalent_2_0 map1cells_disp_bicat

    
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
is_univalent_2_0 (ps_base C D)
 
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
is_univalent_2 D
 exact HD.
    
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
disp_univalent_2_0 map1cells_disp_bicat
 exact (map1cells_disp_univalent_2_0 (pr2 HD)).
  Defined.

  
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
is_univalent_2 map1cells

  
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
is_univalent_2 map1cells

    
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
is_univalent_2_0 map1cells
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
is_univalent_2_1 map1cells

    
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
is_univalent_2_0 map1cells
 apply map1cells_is_univalent_2_0; assumption.
    
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
is_univalent_2_1 map1cells
 
C, D: bicat
HD: is_univalent_2 D
is_univalent_2_1 D

      exact (pr2 HD).
  Defined.

End Map1Cells.

Definition Fobj
           {C D : bicat}
           (F : map1cells C D)
  : C → D
  := pr1 F.

Definition Fmor
           {C D : bicat}
           (F : map1cells C D)
  : ∏ {X Y : C}, X --> Y → Fobj F X --> Fobj F Y
  := pr2 F.

Definition ηobj
           {C D : bicat}
           {F G : map1cells C D}
           (η : F --> G)
  : ∏ (X : C), Fobj F X --> Fobj G X
  := pr1 η.

Definition ηmor
           {C D : bicat}
           {F G : map1cells C D}
           (η : F --> G)
  : ∏ {X Y : C} (f : X --> Y), ηobj η X · Fmor G f ==> Fmor F f · ηobj η Y
  := pr2 η.
